selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 1 > Breakfast > Smoothie — Smoky Variation

node_data.name: Smoothie — Smoky Variation
node_data.short_description: Creamy banana peanut butter oat smoothie; a protein- and fiber-rich option with potential smoky flavor tweaks.
node_data.meal_suggestion: Serving idea: enjoy as a balanced breakfast or post-workout snack. To adjust macros, use dairy-free milk or lower-fat milk; to boost protein, add Greek yogurt or a protein powder; to introduce a smoky note, blend in a pinch of smoked paprika or a dash of cinnamon.
node_data.nutrition_note: Creamy smoothie built from banana, milk, peanut butter and oats. Rich in protein from peanut butter and milk, with fiber from banana and oats, and healthy fats from peanut butter. Calorie content varies by milk type and portion, but a typical 12–16 oz serving is about 400–480 kcal with roughly 14–22 g protein, 40–60 g carbohydrates and 12–20 g fat.

selected_nodes.reasoning: The user is looking for a breakfast option for the child on Day 1 that is neither toast nor yogurt and was previously deleted. The context confirms 'Smoothie — Smoky Variation' was deleted and it matches the criteria of being a non-toast, non-yogurt breakfast meal.
